meta.title: Shop | Honorary Consulate of Hungary — New England
meta.description: Hungary-themed apparel and accessories for Hungarian-Americans in New England. Navy, gold, and the double cross — made for people who carry two identities.

hero.headline: Wear Both Identities
hero.subheadline: Apparel and accessories for Hungarian-Americans who know exactly where they come from. Navy and gold. Serif and double cross. Made for New England winters.

product.shippingNote: Ships via Printful. Allow 5–10 business days.

cart.title: Your Cart

checkout.success: Order placed — thank you. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

cta.headline: Want Something Different?
cta.body: Need a specific design, a bulk order for your Hungarian community group, or a custom piece for an event? Send us a message and we will work something out.
